actionUnits.condition: Call Tab.Open() (MonoBehaviour id=904, script guid=c2bcf79fd38b2441fa17fde42cfce34d) to force this tab to open. Expected: pagePrefab (guid=e749a5bf695bb464390eb1ffd27aba4f, fileID=1905160441634000) is instantiated/activated under TabGroup.TabPageParent; UIFadeTransition (MonoBehaviour id=903, guid=a4ab599ee1dbcea41b165ae5170d9f03) runs TransitionIn with transitionInDelaySeconds=0.1875 and durationSeconds=0.25. Note: To also verify TransitionOut and non-cached page destruction (cachePage=0), another action must close this tab (e.g., selecting another tab in the same ToggleGroup).
